long_description:
[COM]-compute-agent pod is not ready [US-SOUTH-STAGE] is Triggered

TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready
TIP Short Description: A pod is not ready for the past 10 minutes

Metric:

Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'us-south-ngdc-test-staging01-zone3-zonelet' and kube_pod_name = 'compute-agent-z2qbb'

Time:             12/02/2025 07:58 PM UTC
